title: Evolve AgentOS with EvoNexus-inspired operating layer

tasks.title: Document EvoNexus alignment and architecture boundaries
tasks.goal: Create alignment docs and update architecture with core, adapters, extensions and packs boundaries.

agentGoal.draft: /goal Deliver EvoNexus alignment documentation verified by npm run doctor, preserving EvoNexus as reference only.
agentGoal.outcome: Alignment and architecture docs explain adopted and deferred concepts.
agentGoal.verificationSurface: npm run doctor and docs/REVIEW.md evidence
constraints: Do not declare planned placeholders as ready functionality.
agentGoal.iterationPolicy: Make the smallest documentation change that satisfies the PRD acceptance criteria.
agentGoal.blockedStopCondition: Stop after three failed attempts with the same blocker.

acceptanceCriteria: EvoNexus is documented as a conceptual reference, not a dependency.
Architecture separates core, adapters, extensions and packs.

evidence.result: Doctor passed after EvoNexus alignment docs and architecture updates were added.

tasks.title: Create goals, skills and agent layers
tasks.goal: Add markdown-first goals, skills and agent-layer documentation.

agentGoal.draft: /goal Deliver goals, skills and agent layers verified by npm run doctor, preserving IDE-neutral core files.
agentGoal.outcome: Core contains documented goals, skills and layer mapping.
agentGoal.verificationSurface: npm run doctor and docs/REVIEW.md evidence
constraints: No Codex or Claude Code dependency in core.
agentGoal.iterationPolicy: Add markdown-first files and avoid moving existing agents.
agentGoal.blockedStopCondition: Stop after three failed attempts with the same blocker.

acceptanceCriteria: At least seven core skills exist.
Agent layer mapping exists without moving existing agent files.

evidence.result: Doctor passed with core goals, skills and agent-layer documentation present.
Reported 9 files under core/skills, including 7 initial skill markdown files.

tasks.title: Add solutioning, retro, adapter placeholder, extensions and packs
tasks.goal: Add the PRD-requested workflows, Claude Code placeholder, extensions and packs.

agentGoal.draft: /goal Deliver workflows, adapter placeholder, extensions and packs verified by npm run validate, preserving no-new-dependencies and no-runtime-integration constraints.
agentGoal.outcome: Solutioning and retro workflows exist; placeholders are clearly planned or experimental.
agentGoal.verificationSurface: npm run validate and docs/REVIEW.md evidence
constraints: No dashboard, scheduler, database, channels or integrations.
agentGoal.blockedStopCondition: Stop after three failed attempts with the same blocker.

acceptanceCriteria: Claude Code is experimental and isolated under adapters.
Extensions and packs are not declared as ready functionality.
ISP pack lists planned agents and skills.

evidence.result: Template, context and secret validation passed with the new sprint JSON.
Whitespace check passed; Git reported CRLF conversion warnings only.
